message.content:
Based on the mobile screenshot of Hayat Life Care, here's a detailed analysis of responsiveness issues:

## 1. Text Truncation
- **Location text**: "O.R. Nizam Road, Chattogram" appears to be fully visible
- **Land Area text**: "55 Katha" is properly displayed
- **Structure text**: Partially visible at bottom - may be truncated depending on screen width

## 2. Layout Overflow
- No visible overflow issues in the current view
- All content elements appear contained within the viewport

## 3. Button Sizing
- Floating action buttons (FABs) on the right side appear appropriately sized for mobile
- The hamburger menu button in the top-right has adequate size
- No apparent sizing issues with interactive elements

## 4. Spacing Problems
- **Vertical spacing**: Good spacing between "At A Glance" header and image
- **Horizontal spacing**: Elements are well-aligned and properly spaced
- **Margin/padding**: Appears consistent throughout the layout

## 5. Touch Target Sizes
- Floating action buttons (FABs) have sufficient size for easy tapping
- The hamburger menu button appears adequately sized
- No elements appear too small for touch interaction

## 6. Broken Layouts
- No broken layouts visible in the current screenshot
- All elements appear properly positioned and aligned
- The responsive header with logo and menu works correctly
- The "Scroll Down" indicator is properly centered

## Overall Assessment
The mobile layout appears well-structured with no major responsiveness issues. The design maintains proper spacing, adequate touch targets, and proper text display. The layout adapts well to mobile screen dimensions with no visible truncation or overflow problems.
